betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Polonium-210§f

§aRare, extremely radioactive element — RTG power and neutron sources!§f

§bPolonium-210§f (Po-210) is a rare and extremely radioactive element/isotope (§e75 RAD/s§f). Obtainable from recycling spent Ra-226 neutron sources or direct cyclotron production. Pyrophoric and hot in both solid and powder forms due to its 138-day half-life.

§6Production§f:
§b• Ra-226Be Neutron Source Recycling§f — recovering Po-210 from spent research reactor/RBMK neutron sources
§b• Cyclotron§f — produced from iodine or mercury bombardment
§b• Nether Plutonium Ore§f — centrifuging yields Po-210 (if enabled)

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Po-210Be RBMK Neutron Sources§f
§b• RTG Pellet§f — §e50 HE/t§f heat value; with RTG decay enabled: 9,936,000 tick lifespan (~6 real days, 2y7d in-game), producing 347.76 MHE total. Decays to lead.
§b• Self-Charging Battery§f — mid tier, provides §e1.25 kHE/t§f
§b• Yharonite Transmutation§f — end-game material
§b• Polonium Glass§f — powder + sand → smelt into novelty red glass (non-radioactive, functional as normal glass, usable as red glass in recipes)

§eTip§f: The RTG pellet is a strong mid-tier power source. With a ~6 real-day lifespan, it bridges the gap between basic RTGs and nuclear reactors. Stockpile Po-210 from cyclotron production for sustained RTG operation!
